name: Frank Oriental Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Franks, cut into penny-wise slices
6 Green Onions, cut into 1 1/2 in. lengths
2 Ribs Celery, cut into 1 in. diagonal slices
1 Inch piece Ginger, pared and grated
20 oz can Pineapple Chunks, drained (reserve 1/2 C liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve 1 teaspoon cornstarch in 1/2 teaspoon each of sherry and soy sauce. Add frank pieces; mix to coat evenly. Let stand for one hour.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet, add franks and cook 3 minutes until evenly browned. Reserve the cooked franks and set aside.
3. Add remaining oil, stir fry vegetables and pineapple for 2 minutes or until heated through.
4. Dissolve chicken bouillon in hot water.
5. Combine with 1 teaspoon cornstarch, 2 tablespoons sherry, 1 1/2 tablespoons soy sauce, and pineapple juice.
6. Add the cooked franks and soy/sherry mixture to the vegetables and pineapple in the skillet. Continue cooking until thickened and well glazed.
7. Serve over rice. Yield: 4 servings
